acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
Set Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of 21 if these properties are not updated.

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin version to a newer snapshot.
Add explicit release configuration to the compiler plugin to enforce Java 21 API usage.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not strictly enforce API compatibility with Java 21, potentially allowing usage of deprecated or removed APIs.

acceptance-test/src/main/java/io/quarkus.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
